name: scroll-world
description: Build an immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing page for any industry or brand using AI-generated scene stills + a depth map per still and a WebGL parallax shader. As the visitor scrolls, a depth-driven 2.5D camera pushes from outside each scene into its interior, then crossfades to the next scene with no cuts — one continuous connected flight. Interviews the user for the topic, story beats, and brand kit, then generates cohesive stills + depth maps and wires a portable, framework-agnostic scroll-scrub engine. Use for a '3D world' / 'browse-through-the-industry' hero, a scroll cinematic, or a diorama landing. No video generation or Higgsfield CLI required.
